name: Kathy's Strong Ale Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Mixed dried fruits (such as apricots, peaches, apples or raisins)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the ale, dried fruits, brown sugar, oil, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves. Bring to a boil.
2. Cook on a simmer for 3 minutes, then allow to cool.
3. To the fruit mixture, add flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and egg. Stir until smooth.
4. Pour batter into an oiled 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) in a preheated oven for 30 to 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool on a rack before serving. Makes 6 to 8 servings. Each serving contains about: 469 calories; 313 mg sodium; 35 mg cholesterol; 14 grams fat; 80 grams carbohydrates; 6 grams protein; 0.97 gram fiber.
